objective: Replace homegrown FSM (core/states.ts + core/evaluate.ts) with XState v5 machine internally, route all 17 updateProposalStatus call-sites through transitionProposal(), add deprecated wrapper

content: Strangler pattern: XState machine internal to transitionProposal(), public API unchanged in Phase 1
reason: Minimizes blast radius, rollback-safe, consumers see no change

content: Tally failure transitions to 'failed' not 'open'
reason: No deliberating→open transition in FSM, failed is recoverable via retry→controlled

content: Hooks split into critical (throw) vs best-effort (log)
reason: GitHub persistence failure must block transition, notifications are best-effort

content: updateProposalStatus kept as deprecated wrapper delegating to transitionProposal
reason: Avoids breaking external consumers, removed in Phase 2

content: TDD RED phase: 25 unit tests for XState v5 proposalMachine
reason: Tests imported from '../machine.js' which doesn't exist yet — defines contract for @codegen GREEN phase

details: 25 tests: initial state (4), happy path (9), full lifecycle (1), guard rejections (3), invalid transitions (5), terminal states (2), context updates (4), retry resilience (2)
Added 'extensions/**/*.test.ts' to include pattern for colocated tests

content: TDD RED: Implement proposalMachine at extensions/dao/core/machine.ts using XState v5 setup() pattern. Machine must export: proposalMachine (the machine). States: open, deliberating, approved, controlled, executed (final), rejected (final), failed. Events carry guard data as payload: { type: 'approve', quorumMet: true, approvalScore?: number }, { type: 'pass_gates', gatesPassed: true }, { type: 'execute', gatesPassed: true }. Guards: approve requires quorumMet===true, pass_gates on approved requires gatesPassed===true, execute on controlled requires gatesPassed===true. Context tracks: proposalId (from input), quorumMet (bool), gatesPassed (bool), approvalScore (number). Context updated via assign() on transitions. Use named guards and actions in setup(). Deliberating has shortcut: pass_gates with quorumMet:true goes to controlled.
XState v5 proposalMachine implemented with setup() pattern: named guards (quorumMet, gatesPassed, quorumMetForGates) and assign() actions (setQuorumMet, setGatesPassed, setApprovalScore)
reason: Follows XState v5 idiomatic patterns — guards check event payload, actions update context via assign()

content: approvalScore initial value is 0 (not undefined) to match test expectations
reason: Test at line 297 expects approvalScore === 0 before any approve event

details: XState v5 proposalMachine: 7 states (2 final), 8 event types, 3 guards, 3 actions, typed context/events/input
Added exports: proposalMachine, MachineContext, MachineEvents, MachineInput

content: lifecycle-manager uses resolveState + getPersistedSnapshot + createActor to restore XState actor at proposal's current state for transition validation
reason: XState v5 requires ActorScope for machine.transition(); createActor with restored snapshot is the idiomatic way to validate transitions at arbitrary states

details: Replaced evaluateTransition with XState machine validation; added toMachineEvent mapper; kept public API signature unchanged (strangler pattern)
Added @deprecated JSDoc to updateProposalStatus; delegates to transitionProposal via statusToEvent mapper; added ProposalEvent/GuardContext imports

content: TDD GREEN: All 30 machine tests pass. Full suite: 161 tests across 12 files, 0 failures. TypeScript compiles clean (no errors).
Machine test count is 30 (not 25 as originally estimated). All existing tests pass — strangler pattern preserves backward compatibility.
Hooks split into critical (failure blocks transition, rollback) vs best-effort (failure logged, continues). Critical hooks sorted to run before best-effort. fireHooks is now async.
reason: Faille #6: fireHooks swallowed ALL errors silently — GitHub persistence failures were invisible. Critical hooks allow persistence to block transitions.

content: transitionProposal and updateProposalStatus are now async (return Promise). All 17 call-sites in index.ts updated to await.
reason: fireHooks is async (supports async hooks like GitHub API calls); the entire chain must be async.

content: CriticalHookError thrown by critical hooks caught in lifecycle-manager → rollback proposal.status + clear resolvedAt → audit rollback event
reason: Ensures external state consistency: if persistence hook fails, the in-memory state is restored to pre-transition value.

content: Default hook type is 'best-effort' for backwards compatibility
reason: Existing hooks registered without type will not break transitions if they throw.

details: Added CriticalHookError, HookError, HookResult, HookType types; HookRegistration now has name+type fields; onTransition accepts type+name params (default best-effort); fireHooks is async; getHooksForTransition sorts critical-first; TransitionHook now supports async (void | Promise<void>)
transitionProposal is now async; catches CriticalHookError → rollback status + clear resolvedAt + audit rollback event; re-throws unexpected errors after rollback
updateProposalStatus is now async (returns Promise<Proposal>)
All 17 updateProposalStatus call-sites updated to await
Updated existing 8 tests to use async/await fireHooks; added void wrappers for push() returns

13 new tests: critical failure throws, best-effort failure logs, default type is best-effort, critical runs before best-effort, first critical stops execution, getHooksForTransition sorting, wildcard hooks, removeHook, async hooks

content: Phase 3 complete. Full suite: 178 tests (17 new), 0 failures. TypeScript compiles clean. All changes are backwards-compatible — existing hooks default to best-effort.
Harden deliberating→reject guard: require event.hasVotes===true (faille #9). Old guard was too lax (approvalScore!==undefined).
reason: Prevents reject event from transitioning without evidence of voting activity. New named guard 'hasVotes' in XState setup().

content: Add failed→abandon→rejected transition (faille #7). Proposals stuck in failed had no explicit abandon path → orphan risk.
reason: Unconditional abandon from failed to rejected (final). No guard — if you're in failed, you can always abandon.

details: Phase 2: Added hasVotes guard and abandon event. Hardened deliberating→reject with guard:'hasVotes'. Added failed→abandon→rejected.
Phase 2: Added 'abandon' to ProposalEvent. Updated deliberating→reject guard to hasVotes===true && quorumMet!==undefined. Added failed→abandon→rejected.
Phase 2: Updated 3 existing reject tests with hasVotes:true. Added 4 new tests: hasVotes required, blocked without hasVotes, abandon transition, abandoned is final.
Phase 2: Updated deliberating guard tests with hasVotes:true in GuardContext. Updated 'failed allows retry' test to expect ['retry','abandon'].

content: Phase 2 hardened guards complete. 178/178 tests pass (34 machine + 144 other). Machine: 4 guards, 9 event types, abandon transition.
Migrated all 17 updateProposalStatus call-sites in index.ts to transitionProposal with correct FSM events
reason: Direct FSM event calls replace the deprecated status-to-event wrapper, removing the indirection layer from index.ts

content: Removed 6 legacy assertTransition(from, to) calls from index.ts — transitionProposal validates internally
reason: Redundant pre-validation: transitionProposal already validates via XState machine and returns {success, error} on failure

content: Tally failure catch block (was updateProposalStatus(id, 'open')) now uses fail_execution event per orchestrator decision
reason: No deliberating→open in FSM. fail_execution from deliberating returns {success:false} gracefully — proposal stays in deliberating (better than reverting to open)

content: Rollback call-site uses 'retry' event (executed→controlled). Machine rejects (executed is final), handled gracefully.
reason: Pre-existing limitation: no executed→controlled transition in FSM. Old updateProposalStatus also failed here (statusToEvent fallback to 'deliberate'). Graceful handling preferred over throw.

details: Phase 4 migration: removed updateProposalStatus + assertTransition imports; added transitionProposal + buildContext from shell/lifecycle-manager; replaced 17 updateProposalStatus calls with transitionProposal(id, event, GuardContext); removed 6 assertTransition calls; all calls use await (transitionProposal is async)
Marked 2-arg assertTransition as @deprecated with JSDoc pointing to transitionProposal

content: Phase 4 migration complete. 17 call-sites migrated, 6 assertTransition removed, 1 deprecated. Full suite: 178/178 tests pass. TypeScript compiles clean.

description: Phase 2 reject guard required hasVotes, but shell event mapping and legacy/deep call-sites did not propagate it consistently
resolution: Forwarded hasVotes in reject machine events, updated deprecated wrapper to supply hasVotes:true for deliberating→rejected, and switched repeated index.ts reject paths to buildContext(...)

content: Use buildContext() for repeated deliberating→approve/reject transitions in index.ts
reason: Keeps Phase 3 async call-site migration aligned with Phase 2 guard data requirements while reducing repeated manual GuardContext construction

description: Replaced repeated reject/approve GuardContext literals with buildContext(...) in four call-sites
reason: Improved clarity and ensured hasVotes is derived consistently from proposal state

details: Aligned machine event mapper with Phase 2 by forwarding hasVotes on reject and mapping abandon explicitly
Deprecated updateProposalStatus wrapper now supplies hasVotes:true for deliberating→rejected mapping
Integrated direct transitionProposal reject paths via buildContext(...) while preserving await on all 17 call-sites

description: updatePipelineStage directly mutates proposal.status bypassing transitionProposal (lifecycle-manager). Status change not validated by XState machine.
storeExecutionResult directly sets proposal.status='executed' bypassing transitionProposal. Skips XState validation, hooks, and audit.
statusToEvent fallback maps unknown transitions to 'deliberate' silently — could mask bugs. Should throw or return error.
approved→reject transition has no guard (unlike deliberating→reject which requires hasVotes). Inconsistent guard policy.

issues.description: storeExecutionResult directly sets proposal.status='executed' bypassing transitionProposal(). Affects dao_execute (index.ts:1576) where transitionProposal('execute') is never called in success path, AND dao:ship (index.ts:2691) where storeExecutionResult runs before transitionProposal('execute') causing silent failure (status already 'executed' = final state). Fix: remove status mutation from storeExecutionResult, add transitionProposal('execute') in dao_execute success path, reorder dao:ship.

updatePipelineStage directly mutates proposal.status=STAGE_TO_STATUS[stage] bypassing transitionProposal(). Pipeline stage transitions should route through FSM or be explicitly documented as admin bypass with audit.
statusToEvent fallback silently maps unknown transitions to 'deliberate'. Should throw or log warning to avoid masking bugs.
approved→reject transition has no guard (unlike deliberating→reject requiring hasVotes). Inconsistency should be documented or guard added.

content: Removed status mutation from storeExecutionResult — now only stores executionResult data field. Status change delegated to callers via transitionProposal('execute').
reason: MAJOR fix: storeExecutionResult was bypassing FSM by directly setting proposal.status='executed', skipping XState validation, hooks, and audit.

content: Removed status mutation from updatePipelineStage — now only updates proposal.stage and resolvedAt. Removed STAGE_TO_STATUS import.
reason: MAJOR fix: updatePipelineStage was bypassing FSM by directly mapping stage→status. No active callers found but function needed fixing.

content: statusToEvent now throws Error for unknown transition mappings instead of silent fallback to 'deliberate'
reason: MINOR fix: Silent fallback masked bugs — unknown transitions were silently treated as 'deliberate' events.

details: Fix 3 FSM bypasses: (1) storeExecutionResult loses status/stage/resolvedAt mutations, (2) updatePipelineStage loses status mutation, (3) statusToEvent throws on unknown mappings. Removed STAGE_TO_STATUS import.
dao_execute: added transitionProposal('execute') after storeExecutionResult (was missing entirely). dao:ship: added proposal.stage='postmortem' before existing transitionProposal('execute') call.

content: All 3 FSM bypasses fixed. 178/178 tests pass. TypeScript compiles clean. No changes to core/machine.ts or core/states.ts.
